pi_items.verified_value: Equipment Rollover (custom, not in standard OpenCAD GTAV data)
pi_items.source: Verified by checking oc_GTAV_data.sql - contains standard 10-code incident types (10-4, 10-20, 10-50, etc.) but not 'Equipment Rollover'
Verified from OpenCAD-php official schema at https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opencad-app/OpenCAD-php/release/stable/sql/oc_install.sql

OpenCAD official schema defines incident_types table with columns: id (INT primary key), code_id (VARCHAR), code_name (VARCHAR). The actual column storing incident type names is 'code_name', not 'incident_type'

privileged_info_summary: OpenCAD is a real open-source Computer Aided Dispatch system. The task uses the official OpenCAD-php release/stable branch which implements a standard incident_types database table. However, the metadata contains a factual error: the actual column name for storing incident type names is 'code_name' (not 'incident_type' as claimed). Standard OpenCAD incident types use 10-code format (e.g., '10-4', '10-20', '10-50'). The requested incident type 'Equipment Rollover' is a custom type not found in official GTAV game data.
